name: Gentle Lentil Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 or 2 bunches Spinach, chard, or collards, washed and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
2. Add onions, garlic, and celery. Cook, stirring occasionally, for 5-10 minutes until onions are translucent.
3. Stir in lentils and water or stock. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer until lentils are very soft, about 45 minutes. If the soup is too thick, add more liquid as needed to reach desired consistency.
4. Add celery, spinach, salt, and pepper. Simmer for an additional 10 minutes or until greens are tender.
5. Stir in lemon juice just before serving.
Serves 16 preschoolers or 12 school-age children. Suitable as a meat alternative.
